steps.title: Use the thrive clue
steps.content: The passage says the exchange connects small companies to knowledgeable investors and can help those companies thrive. The blank needs a verb for supporting growth or development.

steps.title: Select the growth verb
steps.content: A means label, C means prevent, and D means evaluate. The verb that means foster or help develop matches the exchange's support for relatively small companies. The answer is B.
